channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Water stop cock for street damaged, 13th June
item.description:
Thames water are addressing the issue of the damaged stop cock that has been constantly leaking for months on the 16th June. The issue keeps re occurring because of the weekly refuse collection Lorrie’s pulling up on the kerb and parking there when making collections. The road is narrow anyway and doing this doesn’t gain any access for cars going past it just puts tons of pressure on the water supply pipe causing it to sink. Bollards need to be placed on the pavement stopping cars/vans/lorrys using the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridley Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip in Chequers Way, 13th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been dumped in Chequers Way near the junction with Tottenhall Rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenhall Road, Palmers Green
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat on our driveway, 13th June
item.description:
We found a dead cat on our driveway this morning and moved it in a box. The cat looks like it has been moved to our drive as it is in advance ld decomposing state. We have moved it before taking a photo as we have a young son and did not want him to see it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Bushey Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, 13th June
item.description:
Number of trees badly overgrown making parking difficult.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flat 16 left their rubbish outside the building, 13th June
item.description:
There is rubbish room if they want to put the rubbish away, not just leaving outside like this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frean Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking manhole cover, 13th June
item.description:
The manhole cover rocks and makes a loud noise when a car vehicle is driven over it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hebden Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish on flower bed, 13th June
item.description:
By former library

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The trees from your waste ground at the side of the Holmesdale tunnel west sub station are growing near the roof of my house and have been for a few years now, 13th June
item.description:
Your trees are growing onto the roof of my house which could become an issue if their was a fire . Please can you get them cut asap.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bullsmoor Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Overhanging the highway from private property

item.title: See map, 13th June
item.description:
Crap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dead fox, 13th June
item.description:
A dead fox has been put on top of a Nissan micra as you pull into pawleyne close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pawleyne Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush growing too far into the road., 13th June
item.description:
This bush is growing too far into the road and causing an obstruction. The view up the road is also obscured due to the bush, you are unable to see oncoming traffic. Local residents have young school age children who walk on the road as no pavements inside Walsingham Gate Estate in certain parts. This part in Athelstan Way is one such part. I would hate for a neighbours child or one of my own children to fall victim to a driver who can not see the road clearly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athelstan Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattresses, 13th June
item.description:
One side of road has dumped mattresses. Just opposite has God knows what in a big heap. This ongoing problem is err, ongoing ! We all know where most of it comes from, but everyone seems oblivious, tenants, sub tenants and their couldn’t care less LL. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mixed bulky waste fly tipped - Spearman street, 13th June
item.description:
Overnight dumping within the street at the end of our alleyway being mixed waste containing, paint, broken glass and mixed clothing. Unknown whether reported but less likely to be collected on Sunday. Dangerous and an eye sore.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spearman Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders waster flytipped opposite NISA, 13th June
item.description:
Builders waste flytipped to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping to be cleared, 13th June
item.description:
Flytipping to be cleared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vast amount of alcohol litter, 13th June
item.description:
Groups are congregating at location drinking alcohol and littering, today a large amount of cans and bottles left on the grass. The commons need to be a no drinking zone and fines enforced. The commons do not feel safe, particularly for lone females when groups of males are hanging around drinking and littering. This is an avoidable accident waiting to happen and requires multi agency intervention.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 97 West End Lane, 13th June
item.description:
Pavement is partially locked by overgrown hedge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27a, West End Lane, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2nd report, 13th June
item.description:
Hi, this is second time reporting the traffic light outside hennessy’s has bit of it hanging off bottom, please send someone to repair? thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Continuous fly tipping in Ambleside Close, 13th June
item.description:
Inconsiderate residents keep on leaving their garbage here - and yesterday was collection day, this is simply unacceptable. Find and fine them please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ambleside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 13th June
item.description:
Large builders bag of rubbish ( first reported 15 May) and dismantled fitted wardrobe at side of my house. Blocking pavement for elderly and disabled residents. Potential fire hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartville Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
